case_title: THOMPSON, ERIC vs. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, ERIC SERVED NOV-19-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO FILED AFTER ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ABDALLAH, TAMAN DOES 1 TO 15

2:00PM DEPT 7, JUDGE MCBRIDE. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. BOTH SIDES WAIVE OPENING STATEMENTS. PLTF'S CASE - ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. COURT ADJOURNED UNTIL 9:30AM 8/23/94.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ABDALLAH, TAMAN $8,822.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,010.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,832.60, PLUS COSTS PER COST BILL.
